caption: A man sits at a dark table in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with the gold text "BOSS" across the chest, and a gold watch. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm, wearing black headphones. The background is a white wall featuring a recurring logo with five gold stars and the words "HUSTLE" and "WORK" around them. A blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table to his right is a black container labeled "THE TALK BOX". In the lower-left corner, a small logo reads "THE TALK BOX". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, glancing toward someone off-camera to his right. He begins with a slight smile and closed lips, transitioning to a wider, open-mouthed smile as he speaks, while his hands remain clasped on the table.
